bead.title: test: wire server operator workbench e2e gate
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The new basic server-operator workflows need a repeatable reliability gate that can be run without scale/Axon noise or generated artifact dirtiness.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
- docs/helix/03-test/test-plans/TP-002-server-web-ui.md:383 defines TC-021 for the hermetic E2E gate.
- docs/helix/06-iterate/server-operator-workbench-plan-2026-06-08.md:111 defines Wave 5 as wiring the new E2E specs into the functional gate while keeping scale/perf and Axon separate.
- Previous frontend functional runs showed unrelated scale fixture failure and generated artifacts can dirty the tree, so this basic workbench gate needs a scoped command.

PROPOSED FIX
- Add or update frontend test scripts/config so the five workbench specs can be run as a basic functionality gate.
- Ensure fixtures use temp projects and isolated XDG_DATA_HOME.
- Ensure the gate does not leave generated videos/screenshots/build artifacts in tracked paths.
- Keep scale/performance and Axon tests outside this basic gate.

NON-SCOPE
Do not fix unrelated scale fixture failures in this bead. Do not implement production behavior beyond test/gate wiring.
bead.acceptance:
1. A documented or scripted gate runs exactly: workers-single-pane.spec.ts, workers-dispatch.spec.ts, federation-worker-control.spec.ts, beads-queue-mutations.spec.ts, and spec-editing.spec.ts.
2. Playwright test `workbench gate leaves no tracked dirtiness` or equivalent check proves generated artifacts do not dirty tracked paths.
3. `cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bunx playwright test e2e/workers-single-pane.spec.ts e2e/workers-dispatch.spec.ts e2e/federation-worker-control.spec.ts e2e/beads-queue-mutations.spec.ts e2e/spec-editing.spec.ts` passes.
4. `cd cli && go test -short ./internal/server/...` passes.
5. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
6. `git status --short` after the gate has no new generated frontend/video artifacts except pre-existing unrelated DDx metrics.
